response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: The audio tracks and vocals match the standard lyrics for 'Chocolate Box' and 'Kokuhaku Biyori, desu!' (mislabeled as 'Kokuhaku Nichibyou, Desu!' in the reference). 2. JSON Usage: The Reference JSON provided English translation lines, but many parts of the song were skipped in the live medley. I discarded unused reference lines and performed manual Japanese transcription ('og') and translation matching ('en') for both songs. 3. Timing & Pacing: Subtitles are tightly timed to the vocal waveform. During rapid dialogue, end times of previous subtitles match the start times of subsequent subtitles to avoid cascading delays. I also included a subtitle block for the on-screen title card '告白日和、です！' during the performance transition.

subtitles.original: デコレーションを 散りばめて色とりどって食べちゃおうか
subtitles.english: Shall we scatter and decorate it, and eat it up!

subtitles.original: 苦い苦い愛の溜まり箱 未来味の不思議なチョコレート
subtitles.english: Bitter, bitter, love's treasure box / Future-flavored mysterious chocolate

subtitles.original: 温めて混ぜたらきっと
subtitles.english: Once warmed and mixed, it will surely...

subtitles.original: いつかお口に合う味になるの
subtitles.english: ...someday become a taste that suits our mouths.

subtitles.original: ねえねえちょっといいかな
subtitles.english: Hey, hey, can I ask you something?

subtitles.original: 何？
さっきはあのね ごめんね
何が？
いつももやっとなるじゃん
subtitles.english: We always get annoyed, don't we?

subtitles.original: それで？
今日はこれを渡したくて 言葉じゃ足りないからさ──
subtitles.english: Today, I wanted to give you this... Because words aren't enough, you see.

subtitles.original: だから！
受け取ってくれないかな
何を？
いっしょにいてくれてありがとう
subtitles.english: Thank you for being with me.

subtitles.original: わぁぁぁ！
あなたの優しさに ついつい甘えちゃう
subtitles.english: I end up indulging in your kindness...

subtitles.original: 誰よりも近いから 素直になれない
subtitles.english: ...because we are closer than anyone else, I can't be honest.

subtitles.original: 君の一生懸命さに ついつい忘れちゃう
subtitles.english: I end up forgetting your earnestness...

subtitles.original: 誰よりも一番 大好きなのに
subtitles.english: ...even though I love you more than anyone.

subtitles.original: 甘い甘い夢の宝箱
奇跡味の秘密のチョコレート
二人だけのイノベーションを 探し組み立てたら
subtitles.english: Shall we search and build our own innovation, just for the two of us...

subtitles.original: にぎやかそうか
苦い苦い日々の化粧箱保存
世界味の最初のチョコレート
冷め切って割れないように
subtitles.english: Don't let it cool down and break,

subtitles.original: 大事に包んで生涯の完成まで
subtitles.english: carefully wrap it until the completion of our lifetime.

subtitles.original: いつだって
病めるときも
どんな日も合わわわ
そうずっと
健やかなるときも
手をとって 死が二人を分かつまで
subtitles.english: take my hand, until death parts us two.

subtitles.original: 愛してる
僕もそうさ
そばにいて
そばにいるよ
なんて嘘かもよ？
あぁそうかい 僕も適当に言った
subtitles.english: Ah, is that so? I said it randomly too.

subtitles.original: 甘い甘い？
苦い苦い
甘い甘い恋の魔法箱
宇宙味の秘密のチョコレート
二人だけのデコレーションを 散りばめて色とりどって食べちゃおうか
subtitles.english: Shall we scatter and decorate it, just for the two of us, and eat it up!

subtitles.original: 苦い苦い愛の溜まり箱
未来味の不思議なチョコレート
温めて混ぜたら完璧たい
subtitles.english: Once warmed and mixed, it's perfect!

subtitles.original: いつか最高に幸せな味になるの
subtitles.english: Someday it will become the happiest taste ever.

subtitles.original: いっせーので Thank you so much! See you next time!
subtitles.english: One, two, three! Thank you so much! See you next time!

subtitles.original: 告白日和、です！
subtitles.english: [It's a Perfect Day for a Confession!]

subtitles.original: ねえ ひとつだけ聞いていい？
subtitles.english: Hey, can I ask you just one thing?

subtitles.original: 私のこと...
会えるかな 今日は
心が騒いで
スキップしたくなった
ときめきに躍る瞬間
subtitles.english: the moment I dance with excitement.

subtitles.original: 私のことなど
たぶん気にしてないのだけど
subtitles.english: You probably aren't even thinking about me, but...

subtitles.original: ここにいるんだよ
私はここだよ
自信が揺らぐ
嫌われてないかな
subtitles.english: I wonder if you hate me?

subtitles.original: いきおいで
とにかく挨拶だ！
やっと晴れたね パッと晴れたね
subtitles.english: It's finally cleared up! It's cleared up suddenly!

subtitles.original: そして元気になるね
「おはよう」の代わりに 背中をたたいて
subtitles.english: I'll pat your back instead of saying 'Good morning.'

subtitles.original: さあ行くよ！
やっと晴れたら パッと晴れたら_
subtitles.english: Once it's finally cleared up, suddenly cleared up,

subtitles.original: きっと元気な笑顔
なんだか今のこの気持ちが せつなくなったよ
subtitles.english: Somehow, these feelings I have right now have become painful!

subtitles.original: 授業はうわの空
subtitles.english: My mind is on something else even during class,

subtitles.original: 遠くを眺めた
恋って甘いもんだよね
